# Workflow Bundle
This directory contains the workflow bundle for managing ticket-based implementation in this repository.

## Copilot Directory Documentation
Each directory contains a bundle of agents, prompts, skills, and instructions used by the workflow controller.

## Control Hierarchy
For complex workflows, use an agent as the top-level controller of the workflow, with prompts and skills as components the agent can invoke as needed.

The agent has purpose to achieve a goal, while a skill is scoped to a specific task.

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      Workflow + Purpose                     │
│                      (agents)                               │
└────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┼────────────┐
        │            │            │
        ▼            ▼            ▼
    /whats-next  /fetch-issue  /claim-ticket .... (prompts)
        │            │            │
        └────────────┼────────────┘
                     │
        ┌────────────┼──────────────────────────────┐
        │            │            │       │         │
        ▼            ▼            ▼       ▼         ▼
    issue-      next          solution-  ticket-  push-
    fetching                  proposal   researching pr ... (skills)
    
```

## Workflow Index

### Agents
- workflow.agent.md
- setup-workflow.agent.md

### Prompts

- implement-todo.prompt.md

### Skills

- next
- code-simplifier
- update-issue-status
- push-pr
